---
title: "Playground"
subtitle: "Code, experiments, and things I'm trying out with outputs and syntax included."
description: "{{< var section.analysis >}}"
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing: 
  contents: "playground/*.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  fields: [image, title, subtitle, description, date, categories]
  page-size: 10
---
